name: mid_follow
description: A smooth medium follow shot that keeps the subject near the center while maintaining a moderate tracking distance.
recommended_use: General walking follow shots with steady framing and balanced subject size.

name: side_front_follow
description: A slightly angled follow shot from the side-front for more dynamic movement while keeping the subject readable.
recommended_use: Dynamic movement when the operator wants a more cinematic but still stable tracking angle.

name: mid_follow_safe
description: A conservative medium follow shot with slower motion and larger safety margins.
recommended_use: Fallback template for uncertain instructions, unstable tracking, or safety-first operation.
